chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1238 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4883/25 3.For hearing of main case. 14-10-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G Sindh. **** Learned AAG files comments on behalf of respondent No.3, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner. Admittedly, petitioner is a civil servant and by means of this constitutional petition has challenged show-cause notice issued to him by the competent authority, which through instant petition is barred under Article 212 of the Constitution. Result thereof, instant petition, being not maintainable, is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
